creator: O.Hodson@cs.ucl.ac.uk
text:
The source code for this port is not on the FreeBSD servers and at the time the test build of the ports occured the external server (UCL) was down and so all the fetch attempts failed.  
The UCL server is down for an hour or so every day whilst backup's and nfs servers reboot - departmental policy.

Fix: 

Fetch the code again and maybe mirror on the freebsd ftp servers.
